description: Air-coupled through-transmission scanning rig: honeycomb sandwich composite panel riding conveyor rollers through a C-frame yoke, coaxial TX probe above and RX probe below with clearly visible air gaps (no couplant anywhere), live C-scan inset with flaw-shadow indication. Reveals: rig/probe highlight, crossed-out couplant droplet, beam drawn in across the upper air gap, beam drawn out into the receiver.
